title: [WIP] [CI:DOCS] Re-implement multi-arch image build/push workflow
body:
***Note:*** Depends on https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/78

Previously, this workflow was 95% duplicated across Podman, Skopeo and
Buildah repos.  This new workflow addresses this by utilizing a pair of
purpose-built actions to isolate all the per-repo. logic from the
workflow.  This allows the workflow to be simpler/shorter and 100%
duplicated across all three repos - minus the maintenance burden.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>
